UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile on the AlgoTube platform, storing their personal information, preferences, and social connections.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

username.description: Unique username chosen by the user, used for display across the platform.

email.description: User's email address for contact and account recovery. (Not for authentication)

profilePictureUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture or avatar.

bio.description: A short biographical description provided by the user.

interests.description: A list of tags or keywords representing the user's interests, used by the recommendation engine.

joinedAt.description: Timestamp when the user registered on the platform.

subscriberCount.description: Total number of subscribers for this creator.

subscribedChannelIds.description: References to UserProfile IDs of channels this user has subscribed to.

Video.title: Video
Video.description: Represents a video uploaded to the AlgoTube platform, including its metadata and status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Video entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the video content.

aiSummary.description: A 2-sentence AI-generated summary of the video content.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to the video's thumbnail image.

videoUrl.description: URL to the video file stored in Firebase Storage.

uploadDate.description: Timestamp when the video was uploaded.

viewsCount.description: The total number of times the video has been viewed.

uploaderId.description: Reference to the UserProfile ID of the user who uploaded this video.

likesCount.description: The total number of likes the video has received.

dislikesCount.description: The total number of dislikes the video has received.

commentsCount.description: The total number of comments on the video.

shareCount.description: The total number of times this video has been shared.

processingStatus.description: The current processing status of the video (e.g., 'uploaded', 'processing', 'ready', 'failed').

tags.description: A list of keywords or tags associated with the video.

duration.description: Duration of the media in seconds.

aspectRatio.description: Aspect ratio of the media ('16:9' or '9:16').
